title: All Rooms
description: View and manage all physical rooms in your property. You can edit details, assign them to room types, and see their current occupancy status.
no_property_loaded: Could not load property data. Please ensure you are assigned to a property.

access_denied.title: Access Denied
access_denied.description: You do not have permission to view this page. Please contact an administrator.

edit_modal.title: Edit Room
edit_modal.description: Update the details for this room.

add_modal.title: Add New Room(s)
add_modal.description: You can add multiple rooms at once by selecting them from the list of unassigned room numbers for the chosen type.

form.no_room_types: No room types found. Please create one first.
form.no_unassigned_rooms: No unassigned room numbers for this type.
form.select_type_first: Select a room type to see available numbers.
form.floor_description: Applies to all new rooms being created.
form.amenities_description: Comma-separated list of special features for this room.
form.notes_placeholder: e.g., Near the elevator, noisy in the morning

validation_error.title: Validation Error
validation_error.description: Please select a room type and provide a room name.
validation_error.bulk_create_description: Please select a room type and at least one room name/number to create.

success_create.title: Success
success_create.description: {{count}} new rooms have been created successfully.

success_delete.title: Success
success_delete.description: Room and its associations have been deleted.

error_delete.title: Error
error_delete.description: Could not delete the room. It may have active reservations.

toasts.no_changes_description: You haven't specified any changes to apply.

confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this room? This will also remove it from any unbooked rate plans. This action cannot be undone.
confirm_bulk_delete: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected rooms? This action cannot be undone.
confirm_delete_description: You are about to delete room {{name}}. This action cannot be undone.

bulk_edit_modal.title: Bulk Edit Rooms
bulk_edit_modal.description: The changes you make here will be applied to all {{count}} selected rooms.
